name: Gene's Best Doggone Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, vegetable oil, and egg in a bowl. Beat well.
2. In another bowl, combine dry ingredients: all-purpose flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder.
3. Stir the dry mixture into the milk mixture to make a smooth batter.
4. Grease a griddle if necessary.
5. Cook pancakes over low heat. Makes about nine 4-inch pancakes.
Note: This recipe can be made with buttermilk, but if so, decrease baking powder to 1 1/2 teaspoons and add 1/2 teaspoon of soda.
